findings.evidence: `rg` shows the only in-repo use is line 70 of this same new file, while existing cube internals such as `single_one_injective` and `cubeVertex_sum_mem_subsetSum` are private in `CubeWeight.lean`.
findings.fix: Make this theorem `private` unless a downstream face-boundary declaration actually needs to rewrite translated vertices directly.
findings.issue: `cubeVertex_add_single_eq_insert` is exposed as public API even though it is only used to prove `cubeVertices_upperFace_subset`.

findings.evidence: Lines 75-81 expose `characteristicUpperFaceWeight_le`; lines 92-98 prove lower nonnegativity only by inlining `characteristicCubeWeight_mono`, leaving downstream boundary code without the symmetric face API.
findings.fix: Add `characteristicLowerFaceWeight_le : P.characteristicCubeWeight k x (S.erase v) ≤ P.characteristicCubeWeight k x S` and use it in `characteristicLowerFaceExponent_intCast`.
findings.issue: The lower-face exponent has no named lower-face weight inequality, unlike the upper face’s public `characteristicUpperFaceWeight_le`.

summary: The face-exponent surface is not quite the right public API: it exposes a proof helper while omitting the named lower-face characteristic inequality parallel to the upper-face one.
